title: 🔁 Cosmic Input/Output Interfaces
name: Cosmic Input/Output Interfaces
what_it_is: Systems where the universe functions like a massive I/O engine—each act of perception or creation is an input that alters the output field of reality.
how_to_use: she is an I/O node—what she sees, the cosmos recalculates
he plugs into the interface—his breath changes the sky’s response
animation_behavior: Every action triggers external change, visuals flicker with interaction data, feedback loops visibly alter environment ---
